steps.title: Read the model at 32 degrees
steps.content: The question asks for the prediction from the line of best fit at $x=32^\circ\text{C}$. The graph shows that point on the line at about $480$ visitors.

steps.title: Use table regression as a check
steps.content: Two points on the line are approximately $(28,240)$ and $(32,480)$. Entering them in Desmos gives the same prediction at $x=32$.

steps.title: Round as requested
steps.content: $480$ is already rounded to the nearest $10$, so the answer is $480$.
